meaning: n.天窗,舱室小孔,煤桶,急速逃走vi.急促地跑,急忙撤退vt.凿沉,毁坏,毁坏
examples: Such threats could scuttle the peace conference.
As I picked up the second scuttle by the handles and tried to shovel the coke up off the floor, the mountain began to move.
All this scuttle butt was laughed off as nonsense.
Industry groups opposed the standards and had lobbied for the Bush administration to scuttle them.
Workers already scuttle about in the 200, 000-square-foot plant like ants on a hot plate.
